findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: cryptography@48.0.0 (PyPI) is affected by GHSA-537c-gmf6-5ccf: Vulnerable OpenSSL included in cryptography wheels

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: mcp@1.27.1 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2026-52870: MCP Python SDK: Experimental task handlers allow any client to access and cancel other clients' tasks

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: pydantic-settings@2.14.1 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2026-58203: pydantic-settings: NestedSecretsSettingsSource follows symlinks outside secrets_dir, enabling local file read and bypassing secrets_dir_max_size

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: pyjwt@2.12.1 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2026-48522: PyJWKClient: missing scheme allowlist enables CVE-2024-21643-class SSRF + token forgery via file://, ftp://, data: schemes

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: python-multipart@0.0.29 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2026-53539: python-multipart: Quadratic-time querystring parsing with semicolon separators causes CPU denial of service

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: starlette@1.0.0 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2026-54283: Starlette: request.form() limits silently ignored for application/x-www-form-urlencoded enable DoS

findings.title: Outbound request to a non-constant URL (SSRF risk)
findings.description: client.get(...) called with a dynamic URL; validate against an allowlist
